dignity.system_note: Dignity determines how well a planet can express its natural qualities. Strength scores are additive — multiple dignity factors stack. These values feed directly into the Phase 6 Strength Scoring Engine.

dignity_types.description: Planet in its highest dignity sign — fullest positive expression
dignity_types.expression: Planet operates at maximum potential — significations fully positive
dignity_types.peak_note: Exact exaltation degree gives maximum strength; falls off gradually on either side

dignity_types.description: Planet in its preferred segment of its own sign — very strong
dignity_types.expression: Planet very comfortable — strong consistent positive expression
dignity_types.peak_note: Stronger than own sign but weaker than exaltation

dignity_types.description: Planet in a sign it rules — strong and reliable
dignity_types.expression: Planet fully in command — significations stable and reliable
dignity_types.peak_note: Outside moolatrikona degrees in own sign

dignity_types.description: Planet in a sign ruled by a natural friend
dignity_types.expression: Planet moderately supported — positive expression with some limitation

dignity_types.description: Planet in a sign ruled by a neutral planet
dignity_types.expression: Baseline — no significant boost or penalty

dignity_types.description: Planet in a sign ruled by a natural enemy
dignity_types.expression: Planet uncomfortable — reduced effectiveness, some distortion

dignity_types.description: Planet in its lowest dignity sign — significations distorted
dignity_types.expression: Planet at minimum strength — positive significations suppressed or reversed
dignity_types.peak_note: Exact debilitation degree gives maximum weakness; neecha bhanga can cancel this

house_position_modifiers.description: 1st house is both kendra and trikona — kendra bonus applied
Growth houses — malefics especially benefit here
house_position_modifiers.special_note: Malefics in upachaya houses gain extra 0.5 bonus over benefics

house_position_modifiers.description: Malefic houses — generally weakens positive significations
house_position_modifiers.special_note: Dusthana lords in own dusthana can trigger Viparita Raja Yoga

aspect_dignity_modifiers.description: Jupiter's aspect improves any planet's effective dignity
Venus's aspect mildly improves a planet's expression
Saturn's aspect suppresses and delays a planet's expression
Mars's aspect creates aggression and disruption
Rahu's aspect creates obsession and amplifies both good and bad
Ketu's aspect creates detachment and unpredictability

special_conditions.description: Planet within Sun's orb loses strength and independence
special_conditions.exception: Mercury cazimi (within 1 degree) is strengthened per some schools

special_conditions.description: Retrograde planet intensifies its significations — can be positive or negative
special_conditions.note: Retrograde planet in own/exaltation sign is especially powerful; in enemy sign especially difficult

special_conditions.description: Planet at standstill before turning retrograde/direct — very powerful
Planet in same sign in both D1 and D9 — significantly strengthened
special_conditions.note: Especially powerful for interpretation — planet acts as if in own sign

special_conditions.description: Planet with highest degree in chart — soul significator, extra weight in interpretation
Planet in its directional strength house — powerful positional dignity

strength_interpretation.label: very_strong
strength_interpretation.interpretation: Full positive expression — classical effects apply completely

strength_interpretation.label: strong
strength_interpretation.interpretation: Good expression — most positive effects manifest reliably

strength_interpretation.label: moderate
strength_interpretation.interpretation: Mixed expression — partial results, context dependent

strength_interpretation.label: very_weak
strength_interpretation.interpretation: Minimal expression — planet struggles to deliver results

strength_interpretation.label: afflicted
strength_interpretation.interpretation: Distorted expression — positive meanings may reverse to negative
